text: Step 4: integrate %-flow into list-view sub-aim creation
description: AimCreationModal.vue (raw "Weight:" field at :303) + list-store.ts createAim (:590,:622 createSubAim): replace raw weight with the %-based flow, opening ConnectionDetailsModal post-create ONLY when a parent is implicit (sub-aim list context), not floating/top-level. Completes the unbuilt %/loopWeight half of done-aim 7a1e6736.

status.comment: list-store.createAim now tracks implicitParentId (branch A: currentAim.expanded+after; branch B: path.aims>1 parentAim) and, after closeAimModal, reloads parent+child and opens ConnectionDetailsModal — only for implicit-parent sub-aim contexts (not floating/phase/graph). vue-tsc clean.
